results.title: undertone
results.overview: The host of a popular paranormal podcast becomes haunted by terrifying recordings mysteriously sent her way.

results.title: Fuze
results.overview: An unexploded WWII bomb is discovered on a busy construction site in the centre of London. Chaos ensues as the military and police begin a mass evacuation against a ticking clock.

results.title: Primitive War
results.overview: During the Vietnam War, a recon unit ventures to an isolated jungle valley to uncover the fate of a missing platoon. They soon find themselves in a fight for their lives against an unexpected enemy — prehistoric dinosaurs.

results.title: Detective Conan: Fallen Angel of the Highway
results.original_title: 名探偵コナン ハイウェイの堕天使
results.overview: When a string of deadly highway incidents begin, Conan Edogawa's investigations point towards an orchestrated plot rather than mere accidents. As he uncovers a conspiracy involving hidden identities and advanced technology, the case escalates into a high-speed race against time to stop a calculating mastermind before more lives are lost.

results.title: Dear You
results.overview: Xiaowei travels to Thailand to find his "billionaire grandfather" who is out of contact due to debt problems, but unexpectedly find the one who has been corresponding with his grandmother for years is not her husband.

results.title: The Notebook
results.overview: An epic love story centered around an older man who reads aloud to a woman with Alzheimer's. From a faded notebook, the old man's words bring to life the story about a couple who is separated by World War II, and is then passionately reunited, seven years later, after they have taken different paths.

results.title: Good Luck, Have Fun, Don't Die
results.original_title: Good Luck, Have Fun, Don't Die
results.overview: A 'Man from the Future' arrives at an LA diner where he must recruit the precise combination of disgruntled patrons to join him on a one-night quest to save the world from the terminal threat of a rogue artificial intelligence.

results.title: The End of Oak Street
results.overview: After a mysterious cosmic event rips Oak Street from suburbia and transports their neighborhood to someplace unknown, the Platt family soon discovers that their very survival depends on them sticking together as they navigate their now unrecognizable surroundings.

results.title: David
results.overview: From the songs of his mother’s heart to the whispers of a faithful God, David’s story begins in quiet devotion. When the giant Goliath rises to terrorize a nation, a young shepherd armed with only a sling, a few stones, and unshakable faith steps forward. Pursued by power and driven by purpose, his journey tests the limits of loyalty, love, and courage—culminating in a battle not just for a crown, but for the soul of a kingdom.

results.title: The Terminator
results.overview: In the post-apocalyptic future, reigning tyrannical supercomputers teleport a cyborg assassin known as the "Terminator" back to 1984 to kill Sarah Connor, whose unborn son is destined to lead insurgents against 21st century mechanical hegemony. Meanwhile, the human-resistance movement dispatches a lone warrior to safeguard Sarah. Can he stop the virtually indestructible killing machine?

results.title: Uprising
results.overview: Through an AI-driven reinterpretation of Mexican Revolution footage captured by the country's cinema pioneers, this documentary offers a fresh look at a pivotal historical moment. It traces the movement's rise, peak, and fall, the birth of a new nation, and invites us to question the narratives that have shaped our identity and the present we inhabit.

results.title: Kill Bill: The Whole Bloody Affair
results.original_title: Kill Bill: The Whole Bloody Affair
results.overview: A former assassin, known simply as The Bride, wakes from a coma four years after her jealous ex-lover Bill attempts to murder her on her wedding day. Fueled by an insatiable desire for revenge, she vows to get even with every person who contributed to the loss of her unborn child, her entire wedding party, and four years of her life.  After devising a hit list, The Bride sets off on her quest, enduring unspeakable injury and unscrupulous enemies.

results.title: The Death of Robin Hood
results.overview: Grappling with his past after a life of crime and murder, Robin Hood finds himself gravely injured after a battle he thought would be his last. In the hands of a mysterious woman, he is offered a chance at salvation.

results.title: Young Washington
results.overview: Before he led a nation, George Washington was a young soldier thrown into a global conflict. With alliances crumbling and war closing in, he must choose who to trust and confront the leader he's becoming.

results.title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: The End of Evangelion
results.original_title: 新世紀エヴァンゲリオン劇場版 Air／まごころを、君に
results.overview: SEELE orders an all-out attack on NERV, aiming to destroy the Evas before Gendo can advance his own plans for the Human Instrumentality Project. Shinji is pushed to the limits of his sanity as he is forced to decide the fate of humanity.

results.title: Jana Nayagan
results.overview: A clash of ideologies. One stands for the people, the other feeds on control. Their paths collided once before. Years later, a child’s silent fear ignites the past, drawing a former police officer into a battle far bigger than personal revenge.

results.title: Ghost in the Shell
results.overview: In the year 2029, the barriers of our world have been broken down by the net and by cybernetics, but this brings new vulnerability to humans in the form of brain-hacking. When a highly-wanted hacker known as 'The Puppetmaster' begins involving them in politics, Section 9, a group of cybernetically enhanced cops, are called in to investigate and stop the Puppetmaster.

results.title: Ice Cream Man
results.overview: An idyllic summer town descends into madness when an ice cream man serves kids sweet delights with horrifying results.

results.title: Dreams
results.overview: A powerful socialite and a promising ballet dancer begin a dangerous affair. When he secretly crosses the US-Mexico border, she takes desperate measures to protect their future together.

results.title: Leviticus
results.overview: Two teenage boys must escape a violent entity that takes the form of the person they desire most — each other.
